title: REST API: Deprecation of the team discussions API
raw_changelog: The team discussions API endpoints are deprecated and will be removed on March 1, 2027. Migrate to GitHub Discussions instead.
before_text:
## Team Discussions API

List discussions for a team.

GET /orgs/{org}/teams/{team_slug}/discussions

### Response
Status: 200 OK
```json
[
  {
    "number": 1,
    "title": "Design meeting notes",
    "body": "...",
    "author": { "login": "octocat" }
  }
]
```
after_text:
## Team Discussions API (Deprecated)

> **Deprecation Notice:** This API will be removed on March 1, 2027. Migrate to GitHub Discussions.

List discussions for a team.

GET /orgs/{org}/teams/{team_slug}/discussions

### Response
Status: 200 OK
```json
[
  {
    "number": 1,
    "title": "Design meeting notes",
    "body": "...",
    "author": { "login": "octocat" }
  }
]
```
diff_text:

+++ after
@@ -1,4 +1,6 @@
-## Team Discussions API
+## Team Discussions API (Deprecated)
 
-List discussions for a team.
+> **Deprecation Notice:** This API will be removed on March 1, 2027. Migrate to GitHub Discussions.
+

ground_truth.action_required: Plan migration from Team Discussions API to GitHub Discussions before March 1, 2027 deadline.
ground_truth.confidence_notes: Deprecation notice with clear removal date
